strings.title.main.html: "LIFE'S BEEN GOOD TO ME SO FAR"
strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: The player has now mastered the game.
strings.panel.p2.narration.1.html: Radd now rarely loses lives, and always wins the game.
strings.panel.p2.bubble.left.html: Hi, I'm back again to kick your butt! Oops, that's right, you don't have one.
strings.panel.p3.narration.1.html: Needless to say, Radd is having the time of his life.
strings.panel.p4.narration.1.html: But what will happen to Radd when the player gets bored with him?
